The [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] '''XJ7 X-wing starfighter''' was in the service of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
Sporting [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] for armament, the '''XJ7''' featured improvements to the weapons and shielding over the [[XJ6 X-wing starfighter]]. It was the primary space superiority fighter of the Galactic Alliance. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was known to be equipped with XJ7 X-wings. The Jedi Order at the time of Darth Caedus's rule over the Galactic Alliance also used XJ7s for small stealth missions.
